name: standards-refresh.sh --gate review-queue persists per-rule drafts and routes them through review-queue with nothing auto-staged by default
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r21-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

Rule two

prose two.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; D=$OUT/out/_project/reg-2026-07-11T000000Z/drafts/r21-src; [ "$(ls $D/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = "2" ] && grep -q 'review-queue total=2' e.err && grep -q 'staged=0' e.err && echo gate-routes-drafts-hitl-default 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
